task objective: Restore post-game Syncthing status publication when the frontend tracking cache is stale but the backend authoritatively matches and backs up the game.
tests added: src/controllers/gameLifecycleController.test.ts: starts the buffered post-game watch when the frontend tracking cache is stale
design decisions: Treat check_game_exit and backup_game_on_exit as authoritative for post-game game matching instead of allowing the frontend isTracked cache to suppress watch creation.
Start a post-game watch whenever auto-sync is enabled because post-game publication remains buffered until a successful backend backup activates the handoff.
Keep the pre-game tracked guard unchanged because pre-game Syncthing status is published immediately.
Preserve tracked=false in status metadata and logs so cache disagreement remains observable.
results: The new regression test failed before the implementation change and passes afterward.
Ruff lint and formatting, ty type checking, TypeScript type checking, and the Rollup frontend build pass.
